name: volmarket-api
description: Root package for Vercel serverless functions in /api (the static frontend builds from frontend-react/ — see vercel.json).
comment: overrides are REQUIRED for the /api serverless functions on Vercel: (1) uuid -> 9.x — @solana/web3.js pulls uuid@14 (ESM-only) whose CJS require() crashes the CommonJS function with ERR_REQUIRE_ESM; 9.x is dual CJS/ESM. (2) typescript -> 5.x — @solana/codecs pulls typescript@7 (the experimental native compiler), which @vercel/node cannot drive and dies with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading readFile)'. Do NOT set type:module here (breaks the frontend vite build). Re-test /api/fund AND the build on a deploy before changing.
